calendar.matters: Petition For Removal Of Lisabeth Scholten As Trustee Of The 2003 Scholten Family Trust Appointment Of Receiver Or Temporary Trustee And An Accounting And Exhibits In Support Thereof

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Jul-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Lisabeth Scholten As Trustee Of The 2003 Scholten Family Trust Appointment Of Receiver Or Temporary Trustee And An Accounting And Exhibits In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Jul-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Lisabeth Scholten As Trustee Of The 2003 Scholten Family Trust Appointment Of Receiver Or Temporary Trustee And An Accounting And Exhibits In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Jan-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Ross for Lisabeth Finci, Trustee (via Zoom).
Laura Campbell for Tate Scholten and Lucy Scholten, Beneficiaries (via Zoom).

At the outset of the hearing, Mr. Ross informed the Court that the parties had reached a resolution following their prior status conference and requested that the pending petitions be continued for six months, with the hope that they may be withdrawn altogether.

Counsel summarized the terms of the agreement, explaining that the parties had agreed the trustee will appoint a mutually acceptable private professional fiduciary to serve as her agent. The fiduciary will provide recommendations on how to conclude the trust administration, and the trustee will consider those recommendations in good faith, without unreasonably withholding consent. As part of this agreement, both parties jointly requested that Deborah Dolch be appointed as the fiduciary, subject to her availability.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to January 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Jan-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Mediation
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Continued To Jul-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Lisabeth Scholten As Trustee Of The 2003 Scholten Family Trust Appointment Of Receiver Or Temporary Trustee And An Accounting And Exhibits In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Continued To Jul-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Scott Ross appeared in person for and with Lisabeth Scholten Finci (petitioner).
Laura Campbell appeared via zoom for beneficiaries.

Discussion was held regarding mediation, that parties have been unsuccessful in communicating since the filing of the Joint Mediation Statement, and that they are requesting more time to for discussions to come to a resolution.

Ms. Campbell stated that it is not in the best interest of the beneficiaries to have one of the seven properties sold, and that property could potentially be sold under value.

Status on mediation is ordered off calendar. Petition for Instructions and Petition for Removal of Lisbeth Scholten as Trustee of 2003 Scholten Family Trust are continued to July 8, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Mediation
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Lisabeth Scholten As Trustee Of The 2003 Scholten Family Trust Appointment Of Receiver Or Temporary Trustee And An Accounting And Exhibits In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Lisabeth Scholten As Trustee Of The 2003 Scholten Family Trust Appointment Of Receiver Or Temporary Trustee And An Accounting And Exhibits In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Ross for Lisabeth Finci, Trustee.
Laura Campbell for Tate Scholten and Lucy Scholten, Beneficiaries.

Counsel reported that the parties previously attended mediation in October 2024 with Judge Hernandez, but it was unsuccessful at that time. The beneficiaries had requested an accounting before further mediation, which Mr. Ross stated that the trustees had later provided. Ms. Campbell expressed concerns that mediation would be unproductive unless a neutral professional fiduciary was involved due to strong emotions between the parties.

The court ordered the parties to complete mediation by May 27, 2025. A joint status report as to the outcome of mediation shall be filed by June 3, 2025. The court continued the matter to June 10, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and set a status hearing regarding mediation for the same date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
